tagline: Central New York's Longest Operating Pool & Spa Retailer

hero.headline: Central NY's Pool Experts Since 1941
hero.subheadline: For over 85 years, families across Syracuse have trusted Tarson Pools & Spas for pools, hot tubs, and expert service. From your first splash to decades of backyard memories, our CPO-certified team is with you every step.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Pools, Hot Tubs & Everything<br class="hidden md:block"> In Between
services.subtitle: From custom inground pools to Jacuzzi hot tubs and professional repairs, Tarson has been the name Central New York trusts for over 85 years.

cards.title: Inground Swimming Pools
cards.description: Custom-built inground pools crafted to your vision, featuring trusted brands like San Juan fiberglass. Transform your backyard into a luxury retreat.

cards.title: Aboveground Pools
cards.description: Quality aboveground pools in various shapes and sizes, manufactured in the USA by Radiant Pools. An affordable path to endless backyard fun.

cards.title: Jacuzzi Hot Tubs
cards.description: As an authorized Jacuzzi dealer, we offer the full lineup of hot tubs with patented Aqualibrium jet technology for the ultimate relaxation.

cards.title: Pool Service & Repair
cards.description: Factory-trained, CPO-certified technicians providing expert pool repairs, maintenance, and seasonal service for all major brands across CNY.

cards.title: Swim Spas & Saunas
cards.description: Jacuzzi swim spas for year-round exercise, infrared saunas for wellness, and Kodiak cold plunge tubs for recovery — all in your home.

cards.title: Patio & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Designer patio furniture and Brunswick billiards tables to complete your outdoor entertainment space. Create the backyard you have always wanted.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Backyard in Three Steps

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom or Call
steps.description: Stop by any of our CNY locations or give us a call. Our knowledgeable team will listen to your vision and help you explore the right pool, spa, or service options.

steps.title: We Design Your Perfect Setup
steps.description: Our experts craft a custom plan tailored to your space, style, and budget. With 85+ years of experience and top brand partnerships, every detail is handled.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: From installation day to years of enjoyment, we are here with ongoing service, repairs, and supplies. Just like the pool we built in 1992 that is still going strong.

about.label: Why CNY Trusts Tarson
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool & Spa Excellence
about.description: Founded in 1941 as a small family operation, Tarson Pools & Spas has grown into Central New York's number one pool and spa retailer. Our CPO-certified team brings over 100 years of combined experience and maintains 50+ year relationships with top brands like Jacuzzi, Pentair, and Radiant. We are deeply rooted in this community, partnering with organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and earning the 2024 CNY Readers' Choice Award.

features.title: 85+ Years Family-Owned
features.description: Three generations of the Tarson family have built this business on trust, quality, and genuine care for every customer who walks through our doors.

features.title: Authorized Jacuzzi Dealer
features.description: Our 50+ year partnership with Jacuzzi means you get factory-direct pricing, certified installation, and warranty-backed service from people who know the product inside out.

features.title: Award-Winning Service
features.description: Voted the best pool and spa retailer in the 2024 CNY Readers' Choice Awards. Our community recognizes the quality and care we put into every project.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Real Value.
pricing.subtitle: Whether you are shopping for a new pool, hot tub, or need expert service, we provide honest quotes with no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise to Yours
guarantee.description: For 85 years, our name has been our bond. If any product or service does not meet your expectations, we will make it right. Our CPO-certified team stands behind every installation, repair, and recommendation because your satisfaction is how we have stayed Central New York's trusted pool experts since 1941.

faqs.question: How long does a pool installation take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by project type. A fiberglass inground pool can be installed in as little as 2-3 weeks, while custom builds may take 6-8 weeks. Aboveground pools are typically ready in days. We will give you a clear timeline during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our service team holds CPO (Certified Pool & Spa Operator) certification, the gold standard in the industry. Combined with factory training from brands like Jacuzzi and Pentair, you are getting the most qualified technicians in Central New York.

faqs.question: Do you service pools and spas you did not install?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our factory-trained technicians service all major brands regardless of where they were purchased. We handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs across the entire CNY region.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom before deciding?
faqs.answer: We encourage it. We have multiple locations across the Syracuse area where you can see pools, hot tubs, swim spas, saunas, and patio furniture in person. Our staff will walk you through every option with zero pressure.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to make your dream backyard affordable. Visit any of our showroom locations or call us to discuss payment plans that fit your budget.

testimonials.name: Kimberly P.
testimonials.text: We purchased a pool from Tarson Pools in 1992. The liner was replaced once and the pool is in top condition still! The quality and durability have been outstanding for over 30 years.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: I had some initial concerns but after phone calls to management, the issues worked out fine. I love my pool and would hire Tarson's again.

testimonials.name: Local Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Been going to Tarson for 4-5 years for chlorine and pool supplies. They are knowledgeable and always have what I need in stock.

contact.subtitle: Visit our showroom, call, or request a free consultation. With 85+ years of experience and multiple CNY locations, your dream pool or spa is closer than you think.
